parameters.toolDescription: Get ideas from Notion database for categorization
Get specific idea by ID for detailed analysis

values.name: idea_id
values.description: The ID of the specific idea to retrieve

values.name: idea_id
values.description: The ID of the idea to update

values.name: tags
values.description: Single tag to add to the idea (if multiple tags needed, call tool multiple times)

parameters.toolDescription: Get database schema for proper item creation

values.name: database_id
values.description: Database ID to get schema for

parameters.toolDescription: Create new database item from categorized idea

values.name: properties
values.description: JSON properties object based on database schema

parameters.toolDescription: Verify database item creation by getting recent items

values.name: limit
values.description: Number of recent items to get (default: 5)
